objective: Peer micro-transfer P0+P1+P2 into Fabric worktree m5-peer-micro-transfer without morphing mem0/GitNexus/Obsidian/SDD

implementation_scope.title: using-fabric pre-action gating
implementation_scope.objective: Strengthen skill/bootstrap pre-action discipline so agents gate on fab_recall before edits without Stop-hook flood
acceptance_criteria: bootstrap-canonical and/or fabric-recall-playbook contain explicit pre-action gating checklist
tests or skill-size/bootstrap parity still pass

implementation_scope.title: altitude body quality lint
implementation_scope.objective: Reject or warn on session-dump altitude bodies at propose/doctor seams; default warn or configurable propose-gate; do not kill legitimate long guidelines
acceptance_criteria: extract-knowledge or doctor lint detects dump-shaped body
legitimate long guideline fixture still accepted

implementation_scope.title: OpenSpec-style store UX pasteable errors
implementation_scope.objective: Missing-store / unbound / no-write-target errors emit pasteable recovery commands via actionHint + first-hit/store doctor copy
acceptance_criteria: store bind/mount/missing errors include full pasteable fabric store lines
store-ops or first-hit tests assert pasteable remediation strings

implementation_scope.title: archive-as-truth narrative docs
implementation_scope.objective: Docs/onboarding state pending→review as only path to canonical and archive-as-truth lifecycle

implementation_scope.title: CLI signpost infrastructure for renames
implementation_scope.objective: Tombstone/signpost layer for retired command names — warn with successor, no silent alias

implementation_scope.title: doctor --probe JSON readiness
implementation_scope.objective: fabric doctor --probe emits machine JSON readiness snapshot without full fix pipeline

implementation_scope.title: light finish→archive cadence
implementation_scope.objective: Light finish→archive guidance in skill/bootstrap/docs; not a task engine; no Stop-hook flood regression

implementation_scope.title: cross-artifact consistency audit hooks
implementation_scope.objective: Audit/doctor path surfaces consistency signals across bootstrap/skills/config fixtures

implementation_scope.title: relevance_paths drift diagnostic warn-only
implementation_scope.objective: Path-drift remains warn/info only; improve signal readability if needed

implementation_scope.title: related graph readability polish
implementation_scope.objective: Polish related broken-link/hub doctor messages for readability; no Obsidian UI

non_goals: P2-10 pure validation without code (document only)

grounded_patterns.doctor_split: doctor health+fix; audit group for cite/why-not-surfaced
